description: Firm intraday risk tripwire - watches the live cross-asset tape (SPY/QQQ/HYG/TLT/IWM/VIX) and stack drift vs the morning CRO brief baseline, escalating one Telegram ping only on a strictly worse break. data/cro-escalation.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Firm intraday risk tripwire - runs at 14/16/18/20 UTC across the US session via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, watching the tape against the morning CRO brief baseline.
